review_notes: The functions generally map well to the control SC-7 (21) focusing on boundary protection and isolation. The naming conventions are mostly followed, but there are minor improvements suggested for clarity and consistency.
naming_improvements: Consider renaming 'k8s_service_type_not_nodeport' to 'k8s_service_nodeport_disabled' for clarity and consistency with other naming patterns.
title: Boundary Protection | Isolation of System Components
step1_reasoning: The control SC-7 (21) focuses on boundary protection and isolation of system components, which in Kubernetes can be addressed by ensuring network policies are in place to restrict ingress and egress traffic, preventing services from being exposed via NodePort, and ensuring TLS is enabled for ingress traffic. These measures help isolate Kubernetes components and protect them from unauthorized access.
